response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video for vocal music. 2. Identified Hakui Koyori as the performer throughout. 3. Confirmed no vocal music exists in any segment; only speech and instrumental background music are present. 4. Constructed the scene breakdown accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Hakui Koyori talking about her homemade curry and croissant dish, followed by an outro screen featuring an instrumental track and a weekly schedule display.

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori discusses her homemade curry and eating it with croissants.
Outro screen animation with background instrumental music.
Display of the weekly schedule and closing commentary.
